title: YAMHILL REGIONAL FOOD BANK - 211info
text: YAMHILL COMMUNITY ACTION PARTNERSHIP REGIONAL FOOD BANK YAMHILL REGIONAL FOOD BANK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides surplus and donated food to agencies and programs for distribution. Agencies may include independent emergency food box pantries, congregate meal sites, and mobile food pantry sites. Food donations are welcome. 1317 NE Dustin Court McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours (503) 883-4170 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 883-4170 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Yamhill County Services: Emergency Food Clearinghouses Food Banks/Food Distribution Warehouses Food Donation Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
